name: golang-github-masterminds-semver-dev
title: golang-github-masterminds-semver-dev
description:
Semantic versions library in Go
The semver package provides the ability to work with Semantic Versions
in Go. Specifically it provides the ability to:
.
* Parse semantic versions
* Sort semantic versions
* Check if a semantic version fits within a set of constraints
* Optionally work with a v prefix
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-masterminds-semver-dev because Semantic versions library in Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-masterminds-semver-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-masterminds-semver-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-masterminds-semver-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
